# Manufacturing AX Portfolio (moongioh)

> Portfolio: solo design, build and operation of a cloud full-stack ERP (FastAPI, React,
> PostgreSQL, Cloud Run) for an 18-person manufacturing/chemical SME in Korea — first
> production use four weeks in, expanded over about two months.
> Event-sourced data backbone + domain-ontology validation + RAG semantic document hub over
> 16GB of unstructured files. Content is in Korean; this file indexes it for agents.

Author: moongioh · awsgioh@gmail.com · https://github.com/moongioh
Related open-source tool: harness-scope (Apache-2.0) — https://github.com/moongioh/harness-scope

## Core pages

- [Portfolio home](https://moongioh.github.io/manufacturing-ax-portfolio/): overview, 4 pillars, impact metrics (Korean, with English abstract)
- [Resume](https://moongioh.github.io/manufacturing-ax-portfolio/resume.html): full case study and career detail
- [Screen tour](slides.html): key screens of the ERP's admin UI on dummy data (slide deck of screenshots). A live frontend-only demo (static build, MSW mocks) is available on request.

## Architecture walkthroughs (Korean, interactive HTML)

- [Walkthrough hub](https://moongioh.github.io/manufacturing-ax-portfolio/walkthroughs/%EC%9B%8C%ED%81%AC%EC%8A%A4%EB%A3%A8.html): index of all 23 design walkthroughs
- [System overview](https://moongioh.github.io/manufacturing-ax-portfolio/walkthroughs/%EC%9B%8C%ED%81%AC%EC%8A%A4%EB%A3%A8-%EC%8B%9C%EC%8A%A4%ED%85%9C%EC%98%A4%EB%B2%84%EB%B7%B0.html): the whole system on one page
- [Stock event sourcing](https://moongioh.github.io/manufacturing-ax-portfolio/walkthroughs/%EC%9B%8C%ED%81%AC%EC%8A%A4%EB%A3%A8-%EC%9E%AC%EA%B3%A0%EC%9D%B4%EB%B2%A4%ED%8A%B8%EC%86%8C%EC%8B%B1.html): append-only movement ledger, stock as a derived sum
- [Domain ontology](https://moongioh.github.io/manufacturing-ax-portfolio/walkthroughs/%EC%9B%8C%ED%81%AC%EC%8A%A4%EB%A3%A8-%EC%98%A8%ED%86%A8%EB%A1%9C%EC%A7%80.html): business rules as a validated concept graph
- [Document hub (RAG)](https://moongioh.github.io/manufacturing-ax-portfolio/walkthroughs/%EC%9B%8C%ED%81%AC%EC%8A%A4%EB%A3%A8-%EB%AC%B8%EC%84%9C%ED%97%88%EB%B8%8C.html): pgvector semantic search over 16GB of unstructured files
- [Data migration](https://moongioh.github.io/manufacturing-ax-portfolio/walkthroughs/%EC%9B%8C%ED%81%AC%EC%8A%A4%EB%A3%A8-%EB%A7%88%EC%9D%B4%EA%B7%B8%EB%A0%88%EC%9D%B4%EC%85%98.html): keyless legacy data, FK reconstruction, bank-anchored reconciliation

## Machine-readable

- [sitemap.xml](https://moongioh.github.io/manufacturing-ax-portfolio/sitemap.xml): all 25 pages with lastmod
